overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking along the Del Perro Pier at night. The character moves from the entrance past food stalls and the Pier Office building, through an archway, and out onto the open pier with views of the ocean and moon.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden pier entrance at night, approaching the main commercial buildings. A woman in a white jacket walks ahead on the left, while the Pier Office building and Pearls restaurant become visible in the distance with their neon signage glowing against the dark sky.

exiting the covered archway into the more open pier area

vertical red sign with white ICE CREAM text

segments.scene_description: The character walks between the Pier Office and Pearls restaurant buildings, passing under a covered archway that temporarily blocks the sky. The lighting shifts to artificial as the character moves through the sheltered passage, then brightens again when emerging back into the open pier area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier end with food stalls and ocean views

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered area, the scene opens up to the end of the pier with the ocean visible in the distance. The character passes food stalls and benches while walking toward the pier terminus, where a telescope viewer stands ready for ocean observation and the moon becomes visible in the night sky.

events.description: camera turns to face the ocean and look out at the water

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the pier and looking out at the ocean and moon

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the pier edge

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the camera turns to overlook the dark ocean waters. The moon shines brightly in the cloudy night sky while the pier railing and a life preserver box are visible in the foreground. The scene is quiet and empty, with only the sound of the ocean and the glow of the moon illuminating the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling wooden pier at night that gradually opens into a quiet, moonlit vista over the ocean. It begins at the pier entrance, following a character past a woman in a white jacket toward the glowing neon signage of the Pier Office and Pearls restaurant. As the character advances, the scene shifts from the open night air into the artificial light of a covered archway, momentarily sheltering the view before emerging back into the open air. The environment then expands past food stalls and benches toward the pier terminus, where a telescope viewer stands against a backdrop of the rising moon. Finally, the camera turns away from the boardwalk to overlook the dark, shimmering ocean waters under a cloudy sky, framed by a railing and a life preserver box.
